meta.desc_tr: Set Otomotiv NCS uyum rehberi. 2353 lokal NCS S tonu, HEX/RGB bilgisi, arama ve ton filtreleriyle kendi sitenizden calisir.
meta.desc_en: Set Otomotiv NCS match guide. 2353 local NCS S tones with HEX/RGB values, search and tone filters hosted on your own site.
meta.warning_tr: NCS kodlari ve dijital renk onizlemeleri yaklasik eslestirme amaclidir. Uretim, boya karisimi ve numune onayi icin fiziksel NCS kartelasi veya yetkili kaynakla dogrulama yapin.
meta.warning_en: NCS codes and digital previews are for approximate matching. For production, paint mixing and sample approval, verify with a physical NCS chart or an authorized source.
meta.search_tr: NCS kodu, HEX, RGB veya ton ailesi ara...
meta.search_en: Search NCS code, HEX, RGB or tone family...
meta.empty_en: No color found for this filter.
meta.source_note_tr: Kod yapisi NCS S renk sistemi referans alinarak lokal rehber icin uretilmistir; resmi renk verisi degildir.
meta.source_note_en: The code structure is generated for a local guide using the NCS S color system as reference; it is not official color data.
